phrases.english: I have a cat and a dog at home.
phrases.pronunciation: Ladai qittah wa kalb fil manzil.
phrases.context: Use this to tell someone about your pets.

phrases.english: The bird is singing beautifully outside.
phrases.arabic: العصفور يغني بشكل جميل في الخارج.
phrases.pronunciation: Al-'usfoor yughanni bishakl jameel fil kharij.
phrases.context: Say this when you hear a bird singing.

phrases.english: I saw a rabbit in the park yesterday.
phrases.context: Use this to describe an animal sighting.

phrases.english: My neighbor has a very loud horse.

phrases.context: Express your fear of a specific animal.
